content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "不要辣，謝謝",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "你好，我要一份炒飯，不要辣。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ yào yī fèn chǎofàn, bù yào là.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 yao4 yi1 fen4 chao3fan4, bu4 yao4 la4.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I'd like one serving of fried rice, no spicy.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 볶음밥 하나 주세요, 맵지 않게 해주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，炒飯不要辣。還要別的嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, chǎofàn bù yào là. Hái yào bié de ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de5, chao3fan4 bu4 yao4 la4. Hai2 yao4 bie2 de5 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, fried rice no spicy. Anything else?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 볶음밥 맵지 않게요. 다른 것 더 필요하세요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "再一杯紅茶，少冰。",
          "pinyin": "Zài yī bēi hóngchá, shǎo bīng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Zai4 yi1 bei1 hong2cha2, shao3 bing1.",
          "translation_en": "Also a cup of black tea, less ice.",
          "translation_ko": "홍차 한 잔도 주세요, 얼음 적게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "沒問題。總共一百二十塊。",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí. Zǒnggòng yī bǎi èr shí kuài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2. Zong3gong4 yi1 bai3 er4 shi2 kuai4.",
          "translation_en": "No problem. Total is 120 dollars.",
          "translation_ko": "문제없습니다. 총 120원입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie5.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did the customer order?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 주문했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Fried rice with spicy", "Fried rice no spicy and black tea", "Black tea only"],
          "options_ko": ["매운 볶음밥", "맵지 않은 볶음밥과 홍차", "홍차만"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each line after the speaker, focusing on the tone of '不要辣' and '少冰'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice ordering a dish with a customization (e.g., no spicy, less salt) and a drink."
    },
    {
      "title": "送錯餐了",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不好意思，我剛剛點的是牛肉麵，可是這個是滷肉飯。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, wǒ gānggāng diǎn de shì niúròumiàn, kěshì zhège shì lǔròufàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4si5, wo3 gang1gang1 dian3 de5 shi4 niu2rou4mian4, ke3shi4 zhe4ge5 shi4 lu3rou4fan4.",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, I just ordered beef noodles, but this is braised pork rice.",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 제가 방금 주문한 건 소고기 국수인데, 이건 루로우판이에요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "抱歉，我送錯了。我幫您重做一份牛肉麵。",
          "pinyin": "Bàoqiàn, wǒ sòng cuò le. Wǒ bāng nín chóng zuò yī fèn niúròumiàn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bao4qian4, wo3 song4 cuo4 le5. Wo3 bang1 nin2 chong2 zuo4 yi1 fen4 niu2rou4mian4.",
          "translation_en": "Sorry, I delivered the wrong order. I'll remake a serving of beef noodles for you.",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 잘못 가져왔네요. 소고기 국수 다시 만들어 드리겠습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "沒有關係，可是可以快一點嗎？我有點餓。",
          "pinyin": "Méi yǒu guānxi, kěshì kěyǐ kuài yīdiǎn ma? Wǒ yǒu diǎn è.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 you3 guan1xi5, ke3shi4 ke3yi3 kuai4 yi1dian3 ma5? Wo3 you3 dian3 e4.",
          "translation_en": "No problem, but can you make it a bit faster? I'm a little hungry.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮습니다, 하지만 조금 빨리 해주실 수 있나요? 배가 좀 고파요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，我馬上去廚房說。再等一下，五分鐘就好。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ mǎshàng qù chúfáng shuō. Zài děng yīxià, wǔ fēnzhōng jiù hǎo.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de5, wo3 ma3shang4 qu4 chu2fang2 shuo1. Zai4 deng3 yi1xia4, wu3 fen1zhong1 jiu4 hao3.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll go to the kitchen right away. Please wait a moment, it'll be ready in five minutes.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 바로 주방에 가서 말할게요. 잠시만 기다려 주세요, 5분이면 됩니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie5.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What was wrong with the order?",
          "question_ko": "주문에 무엇이 잘못되었습니까?",
          "options_en": ["The food was too salty", "The wrong dish was served", "The drink was missing"],
          "options_ko": ["음식이 너무 짰다", "잘못된 요리가 나왔다", "음료가 없었다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Practice the apology and request phrases: '不好意思', '送錯了', '重做', '再等一下'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Role-play a situation where the waiter brings the wrong dish. Politely point out the mistake and ask for a correction."
    },
    {
      "title": "換一份青菜",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "你好，我剛剛點的是炒飯，可是我想把配菜換成青菜。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ gānggāng diǎn de shì chǎofàn, kěshì wǒ xiǎng bǎ pèicài huàn chéng qīngcài.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 gang1gang1 dian3 de5 shi4 chao3fan4, ke3shi4 wo3 xiang3 ba3 pei4cai4 huan4 cheng2 qing1cai4.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I just ordered fried rice, but I'd like to change the side dish to greens.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 제가 방금 볶음밥을 주문했는데, 반찬을 채소로 바꾸고 싶어요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "可以，沒問題。原本的配菜是豆腐，要換成青菜，對嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Kěyǐ, méi wèntí. Yuánběn de pèicài shì dòufu, yào huàn chéng qīngcài, duì ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ke3yi3, mei2 wen4ti2. Yuan2ben3 de5 pei4cai4 shi4 dou4fu5, yao4 huan4 cheng2 qing1cai4, dui4 ma5?",
          "translation_en": "Sure, no problem. The original side dish is tofu, you want to change it to greens, right?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 문제없습니다. 원래 반찬은 두부인데, 채소로 바꾸시는 거 맞나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "對，謝謝。還有，炒飯少油。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, xièxie. Hái yǒu, chǎofàn shǎo yóu.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, xie4xie5. Hai2 you3, chao3fan4 shao3 you2.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, thank you. Also, less oil for the fried rice.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 감사합니다. 그리고 볶음밥은 기름을 적게 해주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，炒飯少油，配菜換成青菜。我幫您改訂單。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, chǎofàn shǎo yóu, pèicài huàn chéng qīngcài. Wǒ bāng nín gǎi dìngdān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de5, chao3fan4 shao3 you2, pei4cai4 huan4 cheng2 qing1cai4. Wo3 bang1 nin2 gai3 ding4dan1.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, fried rice with less oil, side dish changed to greens. I'll update the order for you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 볶음밥 기름 적게, 반찬은 채소로 바꿉니다. 주문서 수정해 드릴게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxie.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie5.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What change did the customer make?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 무엇을 바꾸었습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Changed the main dish", "Changed the side dish to greens and asked for less oil", "Changed the drink"],
          "options_ko": ["메인 요리를 바꿨다", "반찬을 채소로 바꾸고 기름을 적게 요청했다", "음료를 바꿨다"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Practice the phrase '把配菜換成青菜' and '少油' with correct tones.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice changing a side dish and adding a customization (e.g., less oil, less salt) to your order."
    }
  ]
}
